statusConfig.allStatusesHidden: All status columns are hidden. Enable them in Settings.

statusConfig.description: Customize your project's task workflow by adding, editing, or reordering status columns. Drag and drop to reorder.

dialog.addDescription: Create a new status column for your project workflow.
dialog.editDescription: Update the status configuration for your project workflow.
dialog.iconDescription: Icon to display with the status
dialog.isCompletedDescription: Tasks with this status are considered completed
dialog.isDefaultDescription: New tasks will be assigned this status by default
dialog.name: Name
dialog.nameMaxLength: Name must be less than 50 characters
dialog.slugDescription: URL-friendly identifier (lowercase, numbers, hyphens, underscores only)

dialog.slugPattern: Slug must contain only lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens, and underscores
